description: Per-session learning-capture nudge. Stop hook (nudge.py) detects complex tasks, error-recovery, and user corrections, then records the signals to a per-project pending file WITHOUT blocking Stop — so the session's work summary stays visible. SessionStart hook (surface.py) replays that nudge once at the next session start in the same project, then deletes it. Distinct from harness-curator (cross-session retrospective).
